Z.Liuetal. AdvancesinSpaceResearch77(2026)232–245
4. Conclusi ons
This study investigated the real-time kinematic position-
ing performance of the UAV based on the PPP-B2b ser-
vice, with a thorough analysis and assessment of its
positioning accuracy. The PPP-B2b correction messages
from DOY 142 to 148, 2024 were collected to correct the
broadcast orbits and clock offsets. A forecast epoch correc-
tions (FEC) method was proposed to reduce the orbit
errors at the step-change epochs, with an improvement of
8.6 %, 10.5 %, and 9.3 % in the radial, along-track, and
cross-track directions, respectiv
